content:
🔥 universal-android-debloater-next-generation | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Removing unwanted system applications (bloatware) from Android devices to enhance privacy, security, and performance, without requiring root access.
✨ Key Features: • Cross-platform GUI application • Uses ADB for debloating • Supports non-rooted devices • Improves privacy, security, and battery life • Reduces attack surface by removing system apps
📖 Summary: Universal Android Debloater Next Generation (UAD-ng) is a cross-platform GUI application written in Rust that uses ADB to remove pre-installed system apps (bloatware) from non-rooted Android devices. It aims to improve device privacy, security, and performance by reducing the attack surface and freeing up resources.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
